scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run package:win
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:electron:main && npm run build:electron:preload
scripts.build:electron:main: vite build --mode electron-main && npm run patch:electron-main-bundle
scripts.build:electron:preload: vite build --mode electron-preload && npm run patch:electron-preload-bundle
scripts.patch:electron-main-bundle: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const file = 'dist-electron/main/index.js'; let code = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); const electronImport = 'import { BrowserWindow as n, app as r, ipcMain as i, safeStorage as a } from \"electron\";'; if (!code.includes('y.createRequire')) process.exit(0); if (!code.includes(electronImport)) { console.error('Expected electron import not found in main bundle'); process.exit(1); } code = code.replace(electronImport, electronImport + '\nimport { createRequire as y } from \"node:module\";'); code = code.replace(/var y = [\s\S]*?, b = \[/, 'var b = ['); code = code.replace(/], x = \(0, y\.createRequire\)\(import\.meta\.url\);/, '], x = y(import.meta.url);'); fs.writeFileSync(file, code);"
scripts.patch:electron-preload-bundle: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const file = 'dist-electron/preload/index.js'; let code = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); const esmImport = 'import { contextBridge as e, ipcRenderer as t } from \"electron\";'; if (!code.includes(esmImport)) process.exit(0); code = code.replace(esmImport, 'const { contextBridge: e, ipcRenderer: t } = require(\"electron\");'); fs.writeFileSync(file, code);"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && playwright test tests/e2e --pass-with-no-tests
